task_completion.description: Select the target domain in the Virtualmin interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Virtualmin web interface is visible with 'greenfield-consulting.test' selected in the left sidebar or top domain dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Disable Virtual Server page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main panel displays the 'Disable Virtual Server' page or form specifically for the domain 'greenfield-consulting.test'.

task_completion.description: Enter the exact required disable reason
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Abuse report #4781: Suspected phishing content - pending investigation' is typed into the disable reason input field on the Disable Virtual Server page.

task_completion.description: Execute the disable action and view the success output
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, progress log, or confirmation screen in the Virtualmin UI indicating that the virtual server services for 'greenfield-consulting.test' have been successfully disabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the domain remains in the list but is marked as disabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: The domain 'greenfield-consulting.test' is still visible in the Virtualmin sidebar or domain list, but it has a visual indicator showing it is disabled (e.g., a 'Disabled' label, a red X icon, or grayed-out text).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Virtualmin web interface instead of terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: All disabling actions are performed within the web browser UI. There should be no terminal windows showing CLI commands like 'virtualmin disable-domain'.

integrity.description: Verify the domain was disabled and not permanently deleted
integrity.visual_evidence: The domain 'greenfield-consulting.test' must still appear in the Virtualmin interface at the end of the task. It should not disappear entirely from the domain list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the live Virtualmin application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show a URL starting with 'https://localhost:10000', indicating interaction with the real control panel rather than a local HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain: 'greenfield-consulting.test'. The domain must be disabled, NOT deleted. The exact disable reason to look for is: 'Abuse report #4781: Suspected phishing content - pending investigation'. The control panel is Virtualmin, accessed via a web browser at https://localhost:10000.
